payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Large dark brown/espresso recessed-panel wooden cabinet door with raised trim and a matte finish, occupying most of the crop; vertically oriented and edge-cropped on the right (adjacent stainless appliance) and slightly on the left, with minor surface smudging and no visible hardware, estimated ~1.0 m from the camera.
